plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: Create MARP slide decks and convert to PDF, HTML, PPTX, and Google Slides with visual validation

plugins.name: muck
plugins.description: Four tools for fighting AI slop: spot it, guard against it, clean it up, and learn your voice

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: AirDrop-style context handoff and interactive team coordination for Claude Code sessions in cmux. Sessions are keyed by Claude session ID and auto-registered on SessionStart; addressable via short aliases from the cmux workspace title.

plugins.name: offload
plugins.description: Session memory persistence, prompt logging, and context analysis for Claude Code

plugins.name: ed
plugins.description: Edit, view, or open a file from a cmux-hosted Claude Code session. /ed:edit opens the editor + a hot-reload viewer pane (entr-wrapped automatically) when a viewer is configured for the file type. /ed:view opens a single terminal viewer pane with editor-read-only fallback. /ed:open hands the file to the OS default application (Preview, Keynote, etc.) — no terminal surface. Per-extension config at ~/.config/ed/config.toml.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Multi-provider code review for Claude Code. Pluggable backends route models (GPT, Gemini, Grok, local) through the right CLI. Deterministic pre-gates, attributed findings, post-and-monitor on GitLab/GitHub.

plugins.name: curaitor
plugins.description: AI-powered article discovery, triage, and interactive review. Pulls from Instapaper and RSS, routes articles into Obsidian (Inbox/Review/Ignored) by learned preferences, and runs interactive review/read sessions in cmux browser.
